scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n server,frontend -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:server: cd server && npm run build && node dist/index.js
scripts.dev:frontend: wait-on http://localhost:3001/api/health && cd frontend && npm run dev
scripts.build: npm run build -w server && npm run build -w frontend
